evals.prompt: Add a Health.md CLI flag that lets a user request raw JSON while keeping the normal file-writing export unchanged. Update the app-side request plumbing and tests as needed.
evals.expected_output: Finds the CLI/control-server/sync files, keeps the CLI thin, implements an additive response_mode-style request, updates protocol handling and tests, and preserves JSON outcomes.

evals.prompt: The CLI status response needs to show whether raw iPhone exports are supported. Make the smallest compatible change and update related docs/skills.
evals.expected_output: Adds an optional capability/status field without breaking existing clients, updates Codable/status tests or examples, and updates operator/QA guidance that reads the field.

evals.prompt: A developer changed Mac-initiated export messages and now older iPhone builds fail strangely. Audit the sync protocol and fix compatibility reporting.
evals.expected_output: Checks SyncPayload capabilities and both macOS/iOS switch statements, adds or repairs capability-gated rejection, updates round-trip tests, and preserves structured failure JSON.
